choices.text: require!(counter.authority == ctx.accounts.user.key(), CounterError::Unauthorized) + Signer<'info> on user. Anchor checks signer; require! enforces ownership. Without auth checks, anyone can mutate.

counter.count.checked_add(1).ok_or(CounterError::Overflow)?. Returns Option which converts to Result. Unchecked arithmetic can drain accounts via overflow exploits — always use checked_add/sub/mul/div for user-supplied amounts.
